theme: Place heat sinks against fourth-power radiation
title: Chill the Grid: Sinking Heat Against Fourth-Power Radiation
strategies: place the k sinks at junctions 0..k-1 (checker baseline; wastes them on the cool shell)
rank junctions by heat generation and sink the top-k loudest sources
solve the nonlinear steady state and repeatedly sink the emergent hottest junction, re-solving as hotspots migrate
swap-polish: move any sink whose relocation onto the current hottest free junction lowers the peak further
